locations.name: Pyongyang
locations.blurb: The DPRK's showcase capital — monumental axes, pastel high-rises and the 170-metre Juche Tower over the Taedong River. One of the least-visited capitals on Earth, which makes a simple street walk here feel extraordinary.
locations.fun_fact: The 330-metre pyramid-shaped Ryugyong Hotel, begun in 1987, has never opened — it stayed the world's tallest unoccupied building for decades.
